burn(address,address,uint256).details: V2 enhancement allowing third-party burning with proper authorization

params.debtTokenAmt: The amount of debt tokens (FT/XT pairs) to burn
params.owner: The address that owns the tokens to be burned
params.recipient: The address that will receive the redeemed underlying tokens

createOrder((address,address,address,add.details: Uses CREATE to deploy the order contract at a non-deterministic address
Uses CREATE2 to deploy the order contract at a deterministic address based on the salt

leverageByXt(address,address,uint128,byt.details: V2 enhancement allowing leverage creation on behalf of another address

params.callbackData: Encoded data passed to the flash loan callback for collateral handling
params.recipient: The address that will receive the generated GT (Gearing Token)
params.xtAmt: The amount of XT tokens to use for creating the leveraged position
params.xtOwner: The address that owns the XT tokens to be used for leverage

returns.gtId: The ID of the newly minted Gearing Token representing the leveraged position

name().details: Used for identification and display purposes in V2 markets

returns._0: The name string of the market (e.g., "Termmax Market:USDC-24-Dec")

predictOrderAddress((address,address,add.details: Computes the address using CREATE2 without actually deploying the contract

redeem(address,address,uint256).details: V2 enhancement allowing third-party redemption with proper authorization

params.ftAmount: The amount of FT tokens to redeem
params.ftOwner: The address that owns the FT tokens to be redeemed
params.recipient: The address that will receive the redeemed assets

returns._0: debtTokenAmt The amount of underlying debt tokens received
returns._1: deliveryData Encoded data containing collateral delivery information

burn(address,address,uint256).notice: Burns FT and XT tokens on behalf of an owner to redeem underlying tokens

createOrder((address,address,address,add.notice: Creates a new TermMax order with default parameters
Creates a new TermMax order with a unique salt for address uniqueness

leverageByXt(address,address,uint128,byt.notice: Creates a leveraged position using XT tokens from a specified owner

name().notice: Returns the human-readable name of the market

predictOrderAddress((address,address,add.notice: Predict the address of a TermMax order that would be created with given parameters and salt

redeem(address,address,uint256).notice: Redeems FT tokens on behalf of an owner after market maturity
